---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## User problem

What is difficult today, and who is affected?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the smallest useful outcome. Mockups are welcome if they contain no
account or private-server data.

## Safety and privacy impact

Does this add network access, persistent data, process control, browser access,
an external dependency, or an update/signing change? Explain why it is needed
and how it can remain local-first.

## Alternatives

What existing workflow or smaller change could address the problem?
